name: docs-cockpit
description: Project module / sprint / progress dashboard in a single self-contained HTML file. Aggregates `docs/spec/module/M*.md` + `docs/spec/concept/C*.md` (frontmatter-driven: id / status / sprint / progress / desc / subtasks / docs) into a `file://`-openable page with topbar, hero gauge, KPI strip, module Kanban (5 status columns, click for drawer with subtask checklist + progress slider), Sprint Timeline, Concept Grid. System docs (CLAUDE.md / PRD / DESIGN.md / RFC / memory / roadmap) appear in a separate drawer. Plus state.json sidecar for the status skill. Ships 3 auto-triggered skills (`docs-cockpit` setup, `docs-cockpit-status` standup queries, `docs-cockpit-update` self-upgrade) and 3 slash commands (`/docs-cockpit:build`, `:status`, `:update`).
